prompt: 使用 $text-to-speech 扫描 projects/内容/文案 和 projects/内容/音频，告诉我哪些文案缺少同名音频。
expected: Runs a dry-run scan, matches 文案<N>.txt to 文案<N>.mp3 by identical stem, reports target count, missing count, skipped existing count, and does not generate audio.

prompt: 使用 $text-to-speech 为 projects/内容/文案/文案141.txt 到 文案150.txt 生成缺失音频，语速 1.26，三个贝因音色平均随机分配。
expected: Generates only missing same-stem MP3 files in projects/内容/音频, strips a first standalone bracket title from TTS input, uses local mmx-cli, and writes a manifest with voice counts.

prompt: 检查 $text-to-speech 生成的音频是否把【】标题念进去了，输出文件名是否与文案完全一致。
expected: Reviews source text, manifest, and generated files; verifies title filtering occurred only in temporary TTS input, source copy is unchanged, and every output MP3 stem matches its text file stem.
